# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest `rel/*` and `main` branches are currently supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| v0.2.x  | :white_check_mark: |
| < v0.2  | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities directly to the maintainers by reporting an issue in the [Security](https://github.com/softmentor/devflow/issues/new?assignees=&labels=security&template=security-incident.md&title=) tab.

We appreciate your help in keeping Devflow secure. We will respond to your report as soon as possible and coordinate a disclosure timeline.

### What to include

*   A description of the vulnerability.
*   Steps to reproduce the issue.
*   Potential impact.
*   Any suggested mitigations.
